stimulus:
Welcome! In this study, you will play three short video games, completing a short survey after each game.

Please make sure you are in a quiet environment where you can focus for the duration of the study. Some games may use sound, so please ensure that your device's volume is not muted.

Press any key to begin.
Press any key to proceed to the first video game. Should you encounter a game-breaking bug, please report the issue in the Menu tab to the right of the screen.

response: {"creativity-rating":4,"creativity-free-response":"At first I thought the name was pretty bad, and I thought it would be easy, but after I had to repeat it because I lost, I started to understand, and I saw that to win I needed to follow an order or make a plan to defeat each enemy in the game. I thought the part about the enemies and how each one worked was really ingenious. The game itself is quite simple, but the enemy mechanics are what make the game fun and entertaining.","originality-rating":3,"originality-free-response":"The enemy design was really cool, the sound and the sound story were also good. I believe the most creative part is the enemies and their powers and how to defeat them, and the mechanics of attacking the enemies are creative in my opinion. I really liked it; I hadn't seen anything like it in another game. The graphics aren't very good, nor is the movement mechanics, especially the movement, which I found quite bad.","effectiveness-rating":3,"effectiveness-free-response":"The part that didn't work well, in my opinion, was the movement aspect. I found it very bad; if the character controls were better, it would be more fun. I loved the part about the enemies and how to hit them, and it seems that the longer it takes and time passes, the harder it gets to hit them, which I found quite fun, and that worked very well. The controls may have slightly hindered the movements of trying to hit the enemies.","authenticity-rating":4,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":3,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"I believe that not much effort was put into making the game and its mechanics, but in terms of authenticity, I had never seen a game quite like it in terms of how it was put together, the way the enemies fought, and the way their attacks worked, especially the blue enemy. The others seemed quite authentic, and I believe it was easy to understand what the developer wanted to convey with the game."}

response: {"creativity-rating":2,"creativity-free-response":"In the short time I played, I didn't find it creative. There are many games with the same theme, where you have to move two characters at the same time to reach a point together, or you need both to complete the game. I didn't find anything authentic, maybe only the part about the string that holds the two characters together, but apart from that, I didn't find it creative.","originality-rating":2,"originality-free-response":"Aside from the function of the cord that holds the two characters together and changes depending on whether they move or are far from each other, that might seem creative. Aside from that, nothing in the game is creative. Many games have this theme, where you have to move two characters to get them both to a place at the same time or together, at least in my opinion.","effectiveness-rating":1,"effectiveness-free-response":"The game wasn't fun at any point. Besides having repetitive mechanics, it was too fast, and the developer didn't do anything to lengthen the game or add difficulty. It ended too quickly and too easily, taking away the fun.","authenticity-rating":1,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":1,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"I don't think the developer put in any effort, and the game wasn't authentic at all; it simply copied one of the thousands of games that have the same mechanics. It seems very much like a copy of a game that already has these ideas."}

response: {"creativity-rating":3,"creativity-free-response":"I thought the part where you had to move the words to transform the \"power\" of the block that would become the character was cool. I found it interesting, not fun, but it's cool.
